expiringOffers.title: Everyday Checking $200 Bonus
expiringOffers.description: Tracked offer for new checking customers who complete qualifying account activity. Verify the current offer with the provider before opening an account.

Receive qualifying deposits during the first 90 days.
Maintain account eligibility through the bonus review period.
fees: Overdraft and account maintenance fees may apply.

expiringOffers.title: Chase Total Checking $300 Offer
expiringOffers.description: Tracked Chase checking bonus listing. Terms may change, and availability can vary by user, state, bank, account type, and funding requirements.
requirements: Open an eligible new checking account.

Review account fee waiver and early closure terms.
fees: Monthly service fee may apply unless waiver requirements are met.
